name: claude-env-doctor
description: Generic local-environment doctor for Claude Code. Diagnoses (never blindly mutates) MCP wiring, Windows/WSL networking, Claude Code login/auth, LSP / Node-CLI spawn, Python output encoding, and Playwright browser-MCP setup. Produces a symptom -> environment -> probes -> classification -> safe-next-action report with no secrets. The canonical environment-troubleshooting home other plugins reference.
